discrepancy_analysis:
A. QUESTION: Supp Fig 4c concordant MPNST-G1 samples?

B. REPORTED VALUE: 8 concordant MPNST-G1 samples (from the 2x2 confusion matrix shown in Supplementary Fig. 4c of Suppiah et al. 2023). The supplementary figure shows a Toronto-cohort confusion matrix comparing methylation-based vs transcriptome-based clustering: 8 MPNST-G1 samples concordant (diagonal cell), 1 discordant, with MPNST-G2 showing 0 and 8 respectively. The main paper text states 'unbiased approaches with methylome and transcriptomic signatures agree on two distinct MPNST subgroups (Supplementary Fig. 4c; Adjusted Rand Index = 0.81, p < 0.001)' -- confirming 8/9 MPNST-G1 agreement (the combined cohort variant in panel d shows n=17, ARI=0.76).

C. MODEL VALUE: 6, explicitly caveated as 'max available with RNA-seq'. The model evidently constrained the denominator to samples with single-nucleus RNA-seq (snRNA-seq) data (3 MPNST-G1 + 2 MPNST-G2 + 1 atypical NF = 6 total nuclei samples), rather than the bulk RNA-seq cohort used for the transcriptomic consensus clustering in Supp Fig 4c.

D. RELATIVE DIFFERENCE: |8 - 6| / 8 = 25.0% -> exceeds the ±10% concordance threshold. Classifies as MAJOR (>20% relative difference).

E. ROOT CAUSE: The model used the wrong RNA-seq modality. Supp Fig 4c is built from BULK RNA-seq (Toronto MPNSTs, n=49 QC-passing bulk samples, of which 16-17 are high-grade MPNSTs used in the MPNST-only clustering analysis with 8 MPNST-G1 + 8 MPNST-G2 methylation assignments). The model incorrectly interpreted 'RNA-seq' as the snRNA-seq / 10X dataset (6 samples total including 3 MPNST-G1, 2 MPNST-G2, 1 atypical NF), which is used for Fig 4 (single-nucleus t-SNE) and Supp Fig 9-12, NOT Supp Fig 4c.

F. PROPOSED FIX: Direct the analysis to the bulk RNA-seq cohort (MOESM10 source data / GSE207400) and the methylation assignments in MOESM4. Build the 2x2 confusion matrix across MPNSTs with paired methylation-group and transcriptome-consensus-cluster labels, then read off the MPNST-G1 diagonal cell (expected value: 8).

G. DISCREPANCY MAGNITUDE: MAJOR (25% relative difference, >20% threshold).
proposed_fix: Use the bulk RNA-seq transcriptome consensus clustering of Toronto MPNSTs (GSE207400 / MOESM10 source data) paired with methylation-group labels from MOESM4 to construct the 2x2 confusion matrix. The model mistakenly constrained to the snRNA-seq cohort (n=6) used for Fig 4 / Supp Fig 9, rather than the bulk RNA-seq cohort (16 high-grade MPNSTs with paired methylation + bulk RNA-seq) used for Supp Fig 4c. Correct answer should be 8 MPNST-G1 concordant samples on the 8+1 (MPNST-G1) diagonal of the matrix.
